metadata.name: kwwutils
metadata.summary: General utilities working with Ollama and Langchain

functions.name: kwwutils.kwwutils.execute
documentation:
Decorator used in executing a function
options: embedding, model, models, repeatcnt

functions.name: kwwutils.kwwutils.get_llm
documentation:
Create an instance of llm using Ollama based on the name of the model
options: model, llm_type, temperature

functions.name: kwwutils.kwwutils.get_documents_by_path
documentation:
Retrieve the documents based on pathname
options: pathname

functions.name: kwwutils.kwwutils.create_memory_vectordb
documentation:
Store the documents in an in-mmeory vectorstore based on the pathname 
options: embedding, embedmodel, pathname, persist_directory, vectorstore

functions.name: kwwutils.kwwutils.create_disk_vectordb
documentation:
Store the documents in an in-disk vectorstore based on the pathname
options: embedding, embedmodel, pathname, persist_directory, vectorstore

functions.name: kwwutils.kwwutils.create_vectordb
documentation:
Create a vectordb with data pointed to by pathname.
The supported vectordb_type is disk or memory.
On default return the newly created vectordb or we can return the index if index_flag is set to True.

functions.name: kwwutils.kwwutils.create_vectordb_all
documentation: Create all vectordb with data pointed to by embeddings and pathname. Supported embeddings are: chroma, gpt4all.

functions.name: kwwutils.kwwutils.get_vectordb
documentation:
Return the vectordb based on the embedding and embedmodel
options: embedding, embedmodel, persist_directory

functions.name: kwwutils.kwwutils.get_embeddings
documentation:
Retrieve the model embedding based on the embedding type
options: embedding, embedmodel

functions.name: kwwutils.kwwutils.get_loaders_by_dir
documentation: Retrieve the loader for pdf, csv and txt

functions.name: kwwutils.kwwutils._get_documents_by_dir
documentation:
Retrieve the list of documents based on the file path of the directory
Returns a list of Document

functions.name: kwwutils.kwwutils.create_rag_chain_with_chat_history
documentation: Returns rag chain with chat history
